content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 29, 2002

Alice Calvert
City of Livermore
Administration Building
1052 So. Livermore Avenue
Livermore, CA 94550-4899

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-030

Dear Ms. Calvert:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of March 28, 2002, we are treating as withdrawn your request for advice received by this office in February of this year. Your question related to the past conduct of an unnamed candidate. You questioned whether certain potential expenditures would be considered independent expenditures or contributions. As this question also relates to past conduct with respect to a third party, we are unable to provide written advice. (§ 83114, subd. (b); Reg. 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A) and (C).) Should the issue arise again in the future, we encourage you to continue to recommend the public official seek advice directly from the Commission prior to the conduct at issue.

If you have any further questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Counsel, Legal Division
